adjustments.detail: Upstream changed Parse(r io.Reader) to Parse(ctx context.Context, r io.Reader); this commit still calls the old signature.
adjustments.action: Thread ctx through the call and pass it to Parse.

commits.subject: Wire the parser into the CLI

summary: Two commits were replayed cleanly; the first relies on a parser signature upstream changed.
recommendation: Apply the signature adjustment to the first commit before pushing.
